prompt_text:
### Demographics: 55-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 11 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis)
Heart failure: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis); HF: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger sister)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~25 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 107.6 kg; Height 184.5 cm; BMI 31.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 117/66 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.5%; 9 months ago 8.9%; 6 months ago 8.4%; 3 months ago 7.9%; current 7.1%), FPG (12 months ago 216mg/dL; 9 months ago 231mg/dL; 6 months ago 209mg/dL; 3 months ago 177mg/dL; current 160mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 109.3kg; 9 months ago 106.3kg; 6 months ago 106.3kg; 3 months ago 100.7kg; current 107.6kg), Height (12 months ago 184.5cm; 9 months ago 184.5cm; 6 months ago 184.5cm; 3 months ago 184.5cm; current 184.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 30.0kg/m²; current 31.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 117mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 69mmHg; 9 months ago 67mmHg; 6 months ago 69mmHg; 3 months ago 68mmHg; current 66mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 11U/L; 9 months ago 17U/L; 6 months ago 17U/L; 3 months ago 10U/L; current 13U/L), AST (12 months ago 13U/L; 9 months ago 13U/L; 6 months ago 19U/L; 3 months ago 11U/L; current 17U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 6.5mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 9.0mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 4.0mL/min/1.73m²; current 6mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 101mg/g; 9 months ago 133mg/g; 6 months ago 131mg/g; 3 months ago 123mg/g; current 100mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 93mg/dL; 9 months ago 94mg/dL; 6 months ago 94mg/dL; 3 months ago 91mg/dL; current 95mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 42mg/dL; 9 months ago 40mg/dL; 6 months ago 43mg/dL; 3 months ago 43mg/dL; current 41mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 158mg/dL; 9 months ago 156mg/dL; 6 months ago 152mg/dL; 3 months ago 175mg/dL; current 163mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.2g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 11.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
